channel.title: Comments on: Real Ale Brewing: Full Moon Pale Rye Ale, Ep. 161
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Mark
item.dc:creator: Mark
item.description: I never had rye ale and will buy some to check it out. For what its worth, I never heard the beep.
item.content:encoded: I never had rye ale and will buy some to check it out. For what its worth, I never heard the beep.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Sorry about the beeping, it was a bad computer and we couldn't fix it! This will be the last episode with that beeping noise!!
item.content:encoded: Sorry about the beeping, it was a bad computer and we couldn’t fix it! This will be the last episode with that beeping noise!!

item.title: By: Todd
item.dc:creator: Todd
item.description: Good episode but I couldn't stop listening to the beeping going on in the background. Sorry. Sound guy must have been drunk.
item.content:encoded: Good episode but I couldn’t stop listening to the beeping going on in the background. Sorry. Sound guy must have been drunk.
